query: SELECT id, title, slug, categoryId, tags FROM blog_posts WHERE status = 'published' ORDER BY id LIMIT 50;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QFvPm5Jiq2VbcdU.33b2dcb6631d --database bJpZLaNUAwiEuNvz3b7LGz --execute SELECT id, title, slug, categoryId, tags FROM blog_posts WHERE status = 'published' ORDER BY id LIMIT 50;
